reviews.comment:
Buena atencion, combustible, baños limpios. La crítica es que anuncian Hotel con carteles en la ruta y al llegar te avisan que el mismo está cerrado sin funcionar hace mucho tiempo. #letsguide

(Translated by Google)
Good service, fuel, clean bathrooms. The only downside is that they advertise the hotel with signs along the highway, but upon arrival, they tell you it's been closed for a long time. #letsguide
